expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus: "Confirm that skill improvements for the report-editor feature family do not regress a different feature planning flow" and reiterates it as "a cross-feature regression guard". execution_notes.md also scopes the run to verifying that "report-editor-focused improvements do not change the orchestrator’s behavior in a way that would regress a different feature planning flow."

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md declares: "Primary checkpoint under test ... explicitly scoped to the holdout phase/checkpoint" and provides a "Holdout regression assessment" plus "Pass/Fail determination (holdout)". execution_notes.md confirms scope: "limited to verifying holdout regression properties..." and explicitly avoids non-holdout claims (no phase execution artifacts).
